reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 일단 테스트로 구매 해봤어요! 델탈껌 엄청 좋아해서 배송오자마자 신나서 킁킁 간식박스인건 어찌 알았을까? 포장은 사람이 먹는 에너지바 같이 생겼어요.먹으면 힘이 날것 같은 느낌적인 느낌.. 신나서 물고가는 보리 너무 잘 먹네요 기호성 체크완료!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a test first! My pup absolutely loves delta chews, and as soon as the package arrived, he was so excited sniffing around—how did he know it was a treat box? 😄 The packaging looks like an energy bar for humans. It gives off that 'you'll feel energized after eating this' vibe... He excitedly chews on the barley treats and eats them so well. Palatability check complete! ✅

reviews.name: N****
reviews.content:
애들이 환장하고 먹네요!
개별포장이라 너무 편하고 위생적이에요
좀 딱딱하긴 하지만 손으로 잘라서 줄수있어요
reviews.content_en: My dogs go crazy for these! 🐕 Individual packaging makes them so convenient and hygienic. They're a bit hard, but I can easily cut them into pieces with my hands.

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content:
잘 받았습니다 
애정하는 강아지 용품 판매업체중에 
바잇미를 좋아하는데요 
바잇미 에서 나오는 출시제품들은 
매번 믿고 구매하고 있어요 
애기들이 잘 먹어서 신제품 구매해 봅니다 
항상 믿을수 있는 제품으로 잘 만들어주세요
reviews.content_en: Received it safely. Among dog product brands that I love, I really like BITE ME. I trust and always buy new products that come out from BITE ME. My pups eat them well, so I'm trying their new product. Please keep making reliable products we can always trust! 💚

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 처음사봤는데 환장하고 먹네요ㅋ 에너지바먹고 힘내렴 버들
reviews.content_en: First time buying and my pup goes absolutely crazy for them lol 😄 Here's an energy bar to give you strength, Buddle! 💪

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 같개로 샀다가 아이가 너무 좋아해서 박스로 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: I first bought just one, but my pup loved it so much that I ended up ordering a whole box! 📦

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 첫째가 잘 먹어요. 첫째는 씹는 거 좋아하는 아이에요. 둘째는 씹는 거 싫어하는 아이라 그런지 겉만 빨아먹고 안 먹네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 첫째는 너무 잘 먹어요. 한 개 순삭♡ 담에 첫째용으로 또 살께요♡
reviews.content_en: My first one eats it well. He's a dog that loves chewing. My second one doesn't like chewing though, so she just sucks on the outside and doesn't eat it lol 😂 But my first one eats it SO well. Finishes one in a snap! ♡ I'll definitely buy more for my first one next time! ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 정말 정말 대박이에요! 
입 까다롭고 아무거나 잘 안먹는 강아지들도 다이너바이트 주면 환장 할 것 같아요 >.<
개별 포장되어 있어서 놀러갈때나 산책할때 무조건 들고 나가요! 
정말 강력추천입니다 💚
reviews.content_en: The palatability is seriously incredible! 🤩 Even picky dogs that are fussy eaters and don't eat just anything seem like they'd go absolutely wild for DINERBITE! >_< Since they come individually wrapped, I always bring them along when we go on trips or walks! Truly a strong recommendation! 💚

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 테디 먹는 양을 늘려주려고 주문한건데 부드러워서 큰거 잘 안먹는 테디도 열심히 먹더라구요! 제가 반으로 잘라서 줬는데 확실히 부드러웠어요! 눈물이 많은 아이인데 눈에 좋은 영향 많이 줬으면 좋겠네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I ordered these to increase how much Teddy eats, and since they're soft, even Teddy who doesn't usually eat larger treats is eating them enthusiastically! I cut them in half for him and they were definitely soft! He's a dog with a lot of tear stains, so I hope this has a positive effect on his eyes! :)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
샘플로 다른맛 온거 먹여봤는데 잘먹어서 주문해봤어요.
생각보다 단단해서 먹기 힘들어하긴 하는데 잘게 잘라서 주니까 엄청 조아해요! 통채로 먹이지는 않고 잘게 잘라서 급여하고 있습니다. 너무 조아해요
reviews.content_en: I tried a different flavor sample and he ate it well, so I ordered some. They're firmer than expected and he has a bit of trouble eating them whole, but when I cut them into small pieces he LOVES them! I'm not feeding him the whole piece—I'm cutting them into small portions and he absolutely loves them! 😍

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 다이너바이트 에너지바 어디 놀러가거나 산책갈때 하나씩 챙겨가서 주면 좋더라구용~ 기호성도 좋구 사람 에너지바마냥 기운도 충전되는것같아 좋습니당ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: DINERBITE energy bars are great to bring along whenever we go somewhere or take a walk—I give him one and he loves it! 🐾 The palatability is great, and just like human energy bars, it seems to really boost his energy too! 😊

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 우리 설이는 정말 소문난 입짧녀에 미식견이에요 야외에서는 잘 먹지 않는 설이가 봉투 소리부터 관심을 보이더니 너무 잘 먹는 거 있죠 3가지 맛 모두 기호성이 높아서 대만족합니다 개별 포장으로 산책이나 마실 나갈 때 하나씩 챙겨가고 있어요 입짧은 강아지 친구들에게 추천합니다 💕💕
reviews.content_en: Our Seol is a notorious picky eater and a foodie! 🐕 She doesn't eat well outdoors, but the moment she heard the treat bag rustle, she got interested and ate so well! All three flavors have such high palatability that I'm completely satisfied. I'm taking them one by one when we go for walks or outings since they're individually wrapped. I recommend these to friends with picky eater dogs! 💕💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
간혹 밥을 안먹거나 덜 먹는 경우가 있어서 그럴때 주려고 맛별로 되어있는 미니 에너지바 구매했어요.
간식이라고 아는지 꺼내기만하면 신나서 빨리 달라고 재촉하네요.
그래도 이 에너지바 먹어서 그런지 밥을 더 달라거나 배고프다고 보채진 않는것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: Sometimes my dog skips meals or eats less, so I got these mini energy bars in different flavors for those times. As soon as I pull them out, she gets so excited and bugs me to give them to her right away. But after eating these energy bars, she doesn't seem to ask for more food or whine about being hungry.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
체험단 당첨돼서 먹여봤는데 너무 만족스러워서 재구매할거같아요
우선 기호성이 너무 좋아요!!건사료 절대 안먹고 동결건조사료랑 화식만 먹는 입짧은 댕댕인데 이건 뜯자마자 순삭했어요
그리고 성분도 좋고 국내생산이라 믿고 먹일수있겠더라구요
또 실외배변댕이라 밖에 자주 나가는데 들고다니기 너무 편해요 
산책가방에 세네개 넣어도 가볍고 친구들 나눠주기에도 개별포장이라 너무 좋아요
다들 다이너바이트바 하세요👍
reviews.content_en: I got selected for a product trial and was so satisfied I think I'll repurchase! First, the palatability is amazing!! My pup is a picky eater who absolutely won't touch kibble and only eats freeze-dried food or fresh food, but she gobbled this up the second I opened it! Plus the ingredients are good and it's domestically produced so I can feel confident feeding it to her. And since my dog does her business outside, we're out a lot, so it's super convenient to carry around. Even with three or four in my walk bag it's light, and since they're individually wrapped it's perfect for sharing with other dogs. Everyone should try Dyna Bite bars! 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
정말 에너지바예요.
크기도 크고 식감도 부드럽고
어제 도착해서 조금 잘라주고 정리하는데 나머지 가져다 아주 잘 먹네요~~
reviews.content_en: It's really an energy bar. The size is big, the texture is soft, and it arrived yesterday. I cut a little piece for her and organized the rest, and she's eating it really well~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
포장이 너무 예뻐요
제가 먹고싶다구요
사람이 안 먹게 조심해야겠어요
기호성 굿 재구매하렵니등
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so pretty! I want to eat it myself! I need to be careful so humans don't eat them. Great palatability, definitely repurchasing! 😋

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 신상 간식! 미니 에너지마 마이너바이트 !!
바잇미 제품이라 믿고 보리에게 줬습니다! 
일단 뒤에 성분표를 보면 강아지에게 좋은 식품이 들어가서 
마음이 놓이더라구요 ! 그리고 개별포장이라 들고 다니기 좋고 위생적이였어요 .

🔹든든한 에너지바
🔹신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육
🔹진짜 중요한 HACCP 인증 시설인 안전한 국내! 제조사에서     생산!!!!!!! 

다른 좋은 점 많지만 이 3가지가 저한테는 제일 중요한 조건이였어요! 모두 충족시키는 이 간식 추천해요!! 

그리고 기호도도 높아서 제가 포장지 만지기만하면 보리가 달려와요 ㅋㅋㅋ 또 먹고싶어서 ! 

재구매의사 엄청 완전 있는 제품 입니다 🙆🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME's new treat! Mini Energy Bar Minorbite!! Since it's a BITE ME product, I gave it to Bori with confidence! Looking at the ingredients on the back, it contains foods that are good for dogs, so I felt reassured! Plus it's individually wrapped so it's convenient to carry around and very hygienic.

🔹Hearty energy bar
🔹Fresh human-grade raw meat
🔹HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturing facility!!!!!!!!

There are many other good points, but these 3 things were the most important conditions for me! This treat checks all the boxes so I recommend it!! And since the palatability is so high, Bori comes running the moment I touch the packaging haha, because she wants more! This is definitely a product I'll repurchase 🙆🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
💥바잇미에서 나온 신상 간식💥
   [미니 에너지바 다이너바이트]
뚱띠, 노랑이가 먼저 먹어보았습니다🐶

✅️ 강아지를 위한 든든한 에너지 바

✅️ 신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로‼️

✅️ HACCP 인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산

✅️ 개별포장으로 어디서든 간편하게 급여가능

✅️ 우리아이 최애 특식 기호성 최고‼️

개별포장으로 보관 편리하고 한개씩 들고
산책 나가기 좋아요
저희 아이들한텐 한입에 넣기 큰 크기라
먹기 편하게 작게 잘라주었는데 
큰 힘 안들이고 손으로도 잘 부셔지더라구요
우리 노랑이 접시 싹싹 긁어먹는거봐요😋
기호성 최고ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
울애기들 든든한 영양간식으로 굿굿👍
reviews.content_en:
💥 BITE ME's new treat release 💥
[Mini Energy Bar Dyna Bite]
Dungtti and Norangyi tried it first! 🐶

✅ Hearty energy bar for dogs
✅ Fresh human-grade raw meat included whole!!
✅ HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturer
✅ Individually wrapped for convenient feeding anywhere
✅ My pups' ultimate favorite treat with top-tier palatability!!

It's easy to store with individual packaging and convenient to take one each on walks. My pups find the size a bit large for one bite so I cut them smaller, but they crumble so easily in your hands you don't need much force. Look at how my Norangyi licks the plate clean! 😋 The palatability is incredible! My babies love this as a hearty nutritional treat, totally recommend! 👍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 자주 쇼핑하는데 체험단 돼서 
먼저 체험할 수 있어서 좋네용!!
손으로 잘 부서지기도 하구 개별포장이라 
밖에 나가면 하나씩 들고 나가서 줘도 편해요

냄새는 무슨 냄새인지 모르겠지만 
댕댕이들이 좋아하는 향기인걸루!! 
저희 강아지 코가 옴청 벌렁벌렁 난리났거든요ㅎㅎ

이번엔 전과 다른맛으로 닭고기,소고기,참치 3가지 종류!
다양한 맛으로 선택 가능해서 좋아요!
전 여러맛으로 맛보고 싶어서 믹스인 3가지 종류를
한팩씩 받았습니다:)

알러지나 댕댕이들 상태에 따라 
구매하고 급여하셔야 할 것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en: I shop at BITE ME frequently and got selected as a tester so I could try it first, which was great! It crumbles easily in your hand and since it's individually wrapped, when we go out I can take one and give it to her easily. I can't quite tell what the smell is, but the doggies love the scent!! My dog's nose was going absolutely crazy haha. This time there are three different flavors - chicken, beef, and tuna! It's great to have variety to choose from! I wanted to try multiple flavors so I got one pack each of the 3-flavor mix :) You'll probably want to consider your dog's allergies and health status before purchasing and feeding! 🐕

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바잇미간식 또는 제품을 애용하는 편인데 좋은 품질, 가성비 등 반려인의 마음을
잘 파악하고 만드신 것 같아서 최근에는 우비도 구매했었답니당

요번에 먹여본 다이너바이트는 HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산과
신선한 휴먼그레이드원육이 통째로 들어가있다고 해서 더욱 믿음이 갔습니다

국내산 눈에 불을 켜고 찾는 편이라 대만족!
개별 포장이라 어디든 쉽게 들고다니면서 간편하게 급여하기 좋았어요
강아지를 위한 든든한 단백질간식이라 여름보양간식으로 딱일듯합니당!

맛있게 먹는 모습만 봐도 굳이 제가 안 먹어봐도 맛있을 것 같더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 
쇼파까지 싹싹 핥아서 부스러기 깔끔 처리해버리네용 ㅋㅋㅋ
빈 비닐포장까지 훔쳐 달아나서 아직까지 물어뜯고 집착중입니다..ㅎㄷㄷ
reviews.content_en: I usually use BITE ME treats and products, and they seem to really understand what pet parents need with good quality and value, so I actually bought their raincoat recently too! This time I tried Dyna Bite and I had more confidence in it because it's made in a HACCP certified safe domestic facility with fresh human-grade raw meat included whole. I always search hard for domestic products so I'm very satisfied! It's easy to carry around anywhere with individual packaging and convenient to feed. It's the perfect protein treat for dogs and seems ideal as a summer nutritional snack! Just watching her eat it happily makes it seem delicious even without me tasting it haha. She licked the couch clean and cleared up every crumb! She's even stolen the empty packaging and is still obsessed with chewing it..😅

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 나온 신상 간식을 미루가 먼저 체험할 수 있게 도와주셨어요~ :)
 
첫 번째! 좋았던 부분은 개별 포장이 가능해서 외출 시 가지고 나가기 상당히 편해요! 산책 혹은 여행 시에 가지고 다니면서 급여하면 좋을 거 같아요.

두 번째! 좋았던 부분은 기호성이 좋은 거 같아요. ❤ 미루는 새로운 간식이랑 처음에 친해지는 데 시간이 걸리는데 바잇미에서 나온 미니 에너지바 다이너바이트 같은 경우에는 바로 잘 먹더라고요 ㅋㅋ 이미 최애 간식으로 등극!! YEAH !!✌🏻

세 번째! 좋았던 부분은 믿을 수 있는 바잇미에서 만들었다는 거예요. 아이들 옷 그리고 간식 등 관련된 건 어떠한 성분이 들어갔는지 그리고 어디에서 만들었는지 중요하게 보는 편이에요. HACCP 인증받은 안전한 국내 제조 시설에서 만들었다니 믿음이 갔어요. 거기에 휴먼 그레이드 원육이 통째로!! 안 사먹일 이유가 있나요~~ 맘에 들어요!!

우연히 체험단 기회로 간식을 접하게 된거지만, 이걸 다 먹이고 난 후에는 재구매 예정 1000%입니다!! 고마워요 바잇미~❤️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME's new treat came out and I got to help Miru experience it first! :)

First good thing: It comes in individual packets so it's super convenient to take on outings! It would be great to carry and feed during walks or trips.

Second good thing: The palatability seems great! ❤ Miru usually takes time to warm up to new treats, but with BITE ME's Mini Energy Bar Dyna Bite, she ate it right away haha. Already her new favorite treat!! YEAH!! ✌🏻

Third good thing: It's made by trustworthy BITE ME. When it comes to my kids' clothes and treats, I really care about what ingredients are in them and where they're made. It's made in a HACCP certified safe domestic facility so I felt confident. And it has whole human-grade raw meat!! Why wouldn't you buy it~~ I love it!!

I happened to get a tester opportunity, but after feeding all of this, I'm 1000% planning to repurchase!! Thank you BITE ME~❤️

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
다이너바이트 신제품 소고기, 참치, 닭고기맛을 먼저 먹어볼 수 있게 해주셔서 탄칸쵸가 먼저 먹어봤어요^^
⠀⠀
개별포장으로 8개씩 들어있어 휴대도 간편,
실온보관도 가능하고,
때에 따라 원하는 제품을 골라서 들고 나갈 수 있다는 게 제일 큰 장점인 것 같아요:)
⠀⠀
단면이 궁금해 잘라보았더니🙌🏻
신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로 들어있어서 그런지
단면에 콕콕콕 박힌 원물이 다 보이더라구요👀
⠀⠀
제일 궁금한 참치맛,
평소 생선을 별로 좋아하지 않는 탄칸쵸가 잘 먹을지 궁금했는데
기호성 최강👍🏻 완전 극호😍
⠀⠀
엄마가 먹는 간식이랑 비슷하게 생겨서
엄마가 뺏어먹지 않게 조심해야겠어요🤣
reviews.content_en:
Got to try DYNA BITE's new beef, tuna, and chicken flavors first with Tanchancho! 😊

With 8 individually wrapped pieces, they're super portable and can be stored at room temperature. The best part is being able to choose which flavor I want to bring out depending on the occasion! 😊

I was curious about the cross-section so I cut one open 🙌🏻 and could see all the fresh human-grade raw meat pieces packed inside! 👀

Most curious about the tuna flavor - Tanchancho usually doesn't like fish much, but she LOVED it 👍🏻 She's absolutely obsessed 😍

They look so similar to mom's snacks, I need to be careful so mom doesn't steal them! 🤣

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
⠀
바잇미 미니 에너지 바 다이너바이트 신제품3종
소고기🐮닭고기🐔참치🐟
⠀
신제품은 못 참지 🤤🤤
누구보다 빠르게 신제품 체험 기회주신 #바잇미 🫶🏻
⠀
🔥강아지를 위한 든든한 에너지바
🔥신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로
🔥HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산
🔥개별포장
⠀
입맛 까다로운 차차도 눈 커지게 맛있는 최고의 기호성
애견운동장 뛰뛰 하고 더운 여름 에너지 충전 후 다시
신나게 놀수 있어서 너무나 행복 👍🏻
지금 바잇미에서 1+1+1 행사 하니 런런🏃🏻‍♀️🏃🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME mini energy bar DYNA BITE new 3 flavors 🐮🐔🐟

Can't resist new products 🤤🤤 Thanks #BITEME for giving me the fastest access to new product experiences 🫶🏻

🔥Hearty energy bar for your pup
🔥Fresh human-grade raw meat included whole
🔥Safe domestic production with HACCP certification
🔥Individually wrapped

Even picky eater Chacha loved it with eyes wide open - amazing palatability! After a quick run at the dog park and recharging energy on this hot summer day, she can play again happily 👍🏻 BITE ME is doing a 1+1+1 promotion right now, gotta run! 🏃🏻‍♀️🏃🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
댕댕이들을 위한 에너지바 느낌의 간식!
휴먼그레이드 원육에  HACCP인증 국내 제조사 생산으로 믿고 먹일 수 있어요~

맛은 소고기, 닭고기, 참치맛 세 가지.
입맛이 까다로운 편이라 고민하다가
가금류를 좋아해서 닭고기맛으로 골랐는데 
우와 엄청 잘먹어요😋 기호성 좋아요!!👍

딱딱하지 않고 씹으면 부스러지는 제형이라
손으로도 잘라줄 수 있어요. ㅎㅎ

개별포장이라 산책이나 놀러갔을 때 간식으로 하나씩 까먹기도 딱 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
An energy bar-style snack for pups! Made with human-grade raw meat and produced domestically with HACCP certification, so I can feel confident feeding it~

Comes in three flavors: beef, chicken, and tuna. Since my pup is a picky eater, I hesitated, but she loves poultry so I went with chicken flavor and wow, she eats it so well! 😋 Great palatability! 👍

It's not hard and crumbles when chewed, so I can easily break it apart by hand too.

Since it's individually wrapped, it's perfect for bringing along on walks or trips to give her one as a snack!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
엄마랑 똑같이 저질체력인 솜이를 위해 에너지바 사드렸어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
처음 먹어보는 간식은 킁킁이를 한참 하다가 입에 가져가는데.. 다이너바이트는 그냥 달려드네요ㅎㅎㅎ  완전 잘먹어요!!
솜이가 급하게 먹는 아이라 반으로 잘라서 급여했는데 겉은 단단하고 안쪽은 촉촉해서 꼭꼭 잘 씹어먹으니 좋네요! 
하나씩 개별포장되어있어서 편리해요! 
카페가서 뛰뛰하기전에 먹이니까 날아다녀요 :) 하핫
reviews.content_en: Got Som an energy bar because she has the same low stamina as mom 😂😂😂 When trying a new snack for the first time, she usually sniffs for a while before eating... but with DYNA BITE she just runs right at it! 😄 She loves it so much!! Since Som is a fast eater, I break it in half, and it's great how the outside is firm but the inside is moist so she chews it well! Really nice! 🙂 Each one is individually wrapped so it's convenient! I give it to her before heading to the cafe for playtime and she's zooming around! 😄

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
처음 당첨된 체험담ㅠㅠㅠ
진짜 요즘 매일을 바잇미에서 배송받는중인데 바잇미 체험단이라니?!

우리 모모가 기존 제품도 아주 잘 먹고있었다구요!
아주 환장하는 간식중 하나🫶

새로운맛이 나왔다고해서 믹스3종으로 결정
*소고기.닭고기.참치맛으로 기호성 끝판왕*
!게다가!

>강아지를 위한 에너지바
>신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 그대로!
>어디서든 간편하게 먹일수있는 개별포장

야외활동시 간편하게 하나씩 챙겨나가 에너지보충을 할수있다구!
reviews.content_en:
My first time winning a giveaway ㅠㅠㅠ I've been getting BITE ME deliveries every day lately, and now I'm a BITE ME tester?!

Our Momo already loves the existing products! 🫶 It's one of her absolute favorite treats!

Since new flavors came out, I chose the mix of 3 flavors
*Beef, chicken, tuna - ultimate flavor winners*
And plus!

>Energy bar for dogs
>Fresh human-grade raw meat as-is!
>Individually wrapped for easy feeding anywhere

During outdoor activities, I can easily grab one at a time for an energy boost!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 good 제품 good
그냥 먹여도 되고 쉽게 손으로 부셔져서 사료 위에
뿌려줘도 되고 너무 잘먹어요
말랑한거 같다가도 은근 딱딱하고 아주 좋아요
양도 넉넉하고 하나하나 개별 포장 되어있고
무엇보다 초록초록 색감 너무 이쁜^^
reviews.content_en: Good palatability, good product. Can feed it as-is or easily crumble it by hand to sprinkle over kibble - she eats it so well! It seems soft but is actually quite firm, which is great. Good amount, individually wrapped pieces, and the green color looks so pretty! 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리먹보는 가리는거없이 다 잘먹어요 ..... 
개별포장이어서 엄청 좋아요 여행가거나 외출할때마다 하나씩 들고나가기만하면돼서 편리해여 무엇보다 믿고먹이는바잇미 간식
reviews.content_en: Our Meokbo eats everything without being picky... Individual wrapping is amazing! Super convenient for trips or outings - just grab one at a time. Best of all, it's BITE ME treats that I trust completely!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 오홍! 신상품이 나와서 사봤어요! 우리집 댕댕공쥬는 엄빠가 나갈 준비하고 간식을 주면 먹고 혼자 잘 쉬기 때문에 그 때 주기에 딱 맞는 간식입니당❤️ 이번 간식도 성공❤️ 포장지 뜯자마자 빨리 달라고 쳐다보는 귀야운 뽕이이이이 너무 귀여워ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Ooh! New product came out so I bought it! Our pup princess does well resting alone when we're getting ready to leave if we give her a snack, so this is perfect for that time! 🩷 This one's a hit too! 💕 The moment I opened the package, sweet Ppong looked at me wanting it right away - so cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
일단 알록달록 패키지가 넘 예뻐요🩷
맛이 세가지라 골라 먹는 재미가 좋아보이고 개별 포장 되어있어서 산책 나갈때 간식으로 하나씩 챙겨나가기도 최고! 
에너지 바 이름 답게 먹고나서 에너지 뿜뿜 와다다 날라댕기네요. 장룽지 새로운 간식 성공적!.🧡
reviews.content_en: The colorful packaging is so pretty! 🩷 Having three flavors to choose from is fun, and since it's individually wrapped, it's perfect for grabbing one at a time on walks! True to the energy bar name, she zooms around with energy after eating it! Jang-rungji's new snack is a success! 🧡

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 웰컴딜로 구매 해봤어요! 델탈껌 엄청 좋아해서 배송오자마자 신나서 킁킁 간식박스인건 어찌 알았을까? 포장은 사람이 먹는 에너지바 같이 생겼어요.먹으면 힘이 날것 같은 느낌적인 느낌.. 신나서 물고가는 보리 너무 잘 먹네요 기호성 체크완료!
reviews.content_en: Got it on a welcome deal! She loves Delta chews so much, the moment it arrived she was sniffing excitedly - how did she know it was a snack box?! The packaging looks like human energy bars. Has that feel-good vibe like it'll give you energy when you eat it... Bory gets so excited and carries it around, eating it so well! Palatability confirmed! ✓

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 사랑이도 잘 먹고, 임보하는 애기도 잘 먹어요~ 빼빼로데이라 까까파티 벌였습니다^^ 재료 건강하고 너무 딱딱하지 않고~ 크기도 작아서 너무 만족스러워요!
reviews.content_en: Sarang loves it, and the foster pup loves it too~ We had a snack party for Pepero Day^^ The ingredients are healthy and not too hard~ The size is small too, so I'm really satisfied!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
신제품 다이너바이트 맛별로 먹어본 꽁지! 
소고기, 닭고기, 참치 중 꽁지픽은... 셋 다🤭
원육이 통째로 들어가서 기력에도 좋고
개별포장으로 외출할 때 챙겨나가기 편해서
엄마 마음에도 쏙 든 다이너바이트!
기호성은 물론이고 건강한 간식 찾고있다면
꼬오오오옥 먹어보길 추천해요🫶
reviews.content_en:
Kongji tried the new DYNAMITE by flavor!
Among beef, chicken, and tuna, Kongji's pick is... all three🤭
Since whole meat goes in, it's great for energy
Individual packaging makes it easy to take on outings
Mom's heart is totally won over by DYNAMITE!
If you're looking for tasty AND healthy treats,
I highly recommend giving it a try🫶

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
에너지바 오리맛 엄청 좋아하는데 이번에 신제품으로 참치맛이 나왔다고 해서 체험단 신청해봤어요 ! 
역시 너무 잘먹네요!! 개별포장되어있어서 산책갈때 챙겨가기  너무 좋아용 !
reviews.content_en:
My pup absolutely loves the duck flavor energy bar, so when I heard they released tuna flavor as a new product, I applied to be a tester!
As expected, they're eating it so well!! Since they come individually packaged, it's so convenient to take on walks!

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
평소에도 즐겨먹던 다이너마이트~
새로 출시된 맛들도 기호성 최고네요!
작게 잘라 보상 간식으로 주면, 집중력 최고에요:)
ㅋㅋㅋ든든한 에너지바이기에 캠핑가서도
하나 뜯어서 주면 만족해하네요!
개별포장, 기호성, 건강한 재료 등 최고 간식인 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
DYNAMITE that we've always loved~
The newly released flavors are a huge hit too!
When I give them cut into small pieces as training rewards, the focus is amazing :)
ㅋㅋㅋ Since it's a hearty energy bar, even when we go camping,
if I tear open one, they're satisfied!
Individual packaging, taste, healthy ingredients - it's the perfect treat!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래는 술장고였으나 댕댕이 간식보관 냉장고로 바뀐...ㅎ 바잇미존에 바잇미 간식,영양제 하나하나 채워가는 재미
다이너바이트는 꾸준히 먹이고 있는간식인데 냉장고만 열면 달라고 긁긁 ㅎㅎ 너무 잘먹고 좋아해서 떨어지지않고 채워놓는 간식중에 하나입니다
reviews.content_en:
It used to be a liquor fridge but now it's turned into a doggy treat storage fridge... hehe The fun of filling up the BITE ME Zone with BITE ME treats and supplements one by one
DINAMITE is a treat I keep giving consistently, and whenever the fridge opens, they scratch asking for it hehe They love it so much and eat it so well that it's one of the treats I always keep stocked and never runs out!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이거 기호성 너무너무너무 좋아요!!
개별포장 되어있어서 애카 갈 때도 한개씩 챙겨가기도 편하구용
기존에 오리랑 연어만 있어서 가금류 알러지가 있어 못먹였는데 소고기맛 출시되서 너무너무 좋네용
reviews.content_en:
This has SUCH amazing palatability!!
Since it comes individually packaged, it's easy to take one at a time when going out with the pup
Before we only had duck and salmon, so we couldn't feed it due to poultry allergies, but now that beef flavor is out, I'm SO happy!

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 오리 알러지 있어 연어로 두개 구매했어요. 딱딱하지도 않고 그렇다고 이에 붙는 것도 아니고 잘 먹어서 세일 중에 장만했어요. 애초에 하나 더 구매할 걸.. 재구매하러 가니 바로 품절이네요.
reviews.content_en: My pup has a duck allergy so I bought two salmon ones. They're not too hard and don't stick to teeth either, and they eat well, so I stocked up during the sale. I wish I'd bought one more... now when I go to repurchase, they're already sold out.

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
두께 얇아진거 너무 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
예전엔 두꺼워서 작게 잘라줘야 먹었었는데 지금은 아주 잘 먹어요! 
낱개포장 되어있어서 어디 놀러 나갈때 간식으로 챙겨가기 딱 좋아요 최고최고🐶💗
reviews.content_en:
I love how the thickness got thinner hehe
Before it was too thick so I had to cut it into small pieces, but now they eat it really well!
Since it comes in individual packaging, it's perfect for taking as a snack when we go out to play. Best best🐶💗

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
귀엽고 장난감같은 
바잇미 미니 에너지 바 다이너바이트가 왔네요
어제는 냉방병인지
집에 온 택배들 다 들여놓지도 뜯지도 못하고..
오늘에서야..겨우 겨우 일어나서 택배 정리 하고
아기들 간식정리 하고있네요..
너무 귀여운 간식
reviews.content_en:
Cute and toy-like
BITE ME Mini Energy Bar DYNAMITE arrived
Yesterday with what might be AC sickness
I couldn't even bring in or open all the packages...
Today I finally managed to get up and organize the packages
and organize the babies' treats...
Such a cute treat

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 미니 에너지 바 다이너바이트
ㅡ참치
포장지가 참 너무 너무 귀엽다..
나도 하나 가지고 싶을만큼
특히 다이너마이트 분홍과 오렌지
아니 이제보니 다 귀엽다.
말 그대로 다이너바이트!
아이들이 참 맛있게도 먹는다 ^^
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Mini Energy Bar DYNAMITE
- Tuna
The packaging is SO SO cute..
I want to have one myself
Especially DYNAMITE in pink and orange
Wait, now that I look, they're all cute.
Literally DYNAMITE!
The kids eat it so deliciously ^^

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 다이너바이트 3팩 골라담기
처음엔 땅콩 소스?
들어있다해서 꺼려했는데
강아지가 먹어도 되는거라 해서 주문
아이들이 무척 잘먹어요..
대개 맛있나봐요..
더 달라고
자꾸 벨 누르고 ^^
비싸지만 않으면 자주 구매할텐데
이벤트 해서 구매
살찔까봐도 걱정
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Diner Byte 3-Pack Mix & Match
At first I was hesitant because it said it had peanut sauce in it, but I ordered it since it's safe for dogs. The kids eat it so well... they must really like it... they keep asking for more and ringing the bell 😄 I'd buy it more often if it wasn't so expensive. I got it through an event sale. Though I'm a bit worried they might gain weight.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 나무에게 에너지바를 주셨어요~~~ 
나무의 후기 들려드립니다🧡

✔️소고기, 참치, 닭고기맛으로 기호성까지 좋아서 친구들이 좋아할꺼같아요💚 

✔️거기다 개별표장이라 야외활동때 한개씩 챙겨서 먹으면 최고최고ჱ̒ ｰ̀֊ｰ́ ) 

✔️HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산이라 안심하고 먹어도 좋을꺼같아요✨

감사합니다🤍 바잇미
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME gave Namu an energy bar!!! Here's Namu's review 🧡

✔️The flavors—beef, tuna, and chicken—taste so good that I think other dogs would love them too 💚

✔️Plus, they come individually wrapped, so it's perfect to grab one at a time during outdoor activities ჱ̒ ｰ̀֊ｰ́ )

✔️It's made domestically by HACCP certified manufacturers, so you can feed it with peace of mind ✨

Thank you 🤍 BITE ME

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
기호성고 좋고, 휴대하기도 너무 좋아서!!
산책용으로 너무너무 좋을꺼 같애여!!
reviews.content_en: The taste is great and it's so convenient to carry!! I think it'll be perfect for walks!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 간식 체험단에 당첨되어 믹스맛으로 주문해봤습니다 ! 에너지바같은 비쥬얼에 개별포장이 되어있어서 산책갈때 하나씩 들고가기 참 좋아요 ❤️ 저희집 강쥐는 소고기맛 참치맛 치킨맛 세가지 다 잘 먹네요?! 믿고 먹일 수 있는 바잇미 간식 추천합니다 ! 😃
reviews.content_en: I won a snack trial and ordered the mixed flavors! With the energy bar-like appearance and individual wrapping, it's so convenient to bring one along on walks ❤️ My pup eats all three flavors—beef, tuna, and chicken—really well?! I recommend BITE ME snacks that you can confidently feed your dog! 😃

reviews.name: 석****
reviews.content: 평소 입이 짧은편이라 에너지바는 필수인편!! 마침 바잇미에서 체험단중이라 언능 신청했어요! 간식도 먹던것만 먹는 까탈쟁이인데 바잇미 에너지바 합격 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ또 사먹을거 같아요🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: My dog's normally a picky eater, so energy bars are a must!! I quickly applied when I saw BITE ME was doing a trial event! Even though my dog only eats certain snacks, BITE ME energy bars passed the test haha! I think I'll buy them again 🫶🏻

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
쟁여놓고 주는 간식! 왠지 다른거보다 내용물이 건강한 느낌
말랑해서 치아에 무리도 없고 손에 안묻어나고 편하게 잘라먹일수있어 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: A snack to keep stocked! For some reason it feels healthier than other brands. It's soft so there's no stress on teeth, doesn't get messy on hands, and it's easy to cut and feed. Love it~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
첫회원 할인받아 15,000-> 4,900원에 샀는데 지그**에서는 8,900원에 팔더라구요??
다음부턴 필요하면 지그**에서 구매할거 같아요..
미니비숑인에 알러지있어서 가금류는 못먹이는데 연어에 다양한 야채까지 들어있어서 든든한 간식인거 같고 마음 편히 줄 수 있어요
생각보다 크기가 작아 아쉽지만 강아지가 잘먹어서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it on a first-time member discount for 4,900 won (down from 15,000), but I saw it was 8,900 won at zig**... I'll probably buy from zig** next time if needed. My mini Bichon has allergies and can't eat poultry, so I'm really happy that these have salmon and lots of vegetables in them—it's a snack I can give with peace of mind. The size is a bit smaller than expected, but my dog eats it well so that's good!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저번에 3개짜리 구매해봤는데 잘먹기도하고 재료들이 콕콕 박혀있는게보이니 먹여도좋을거같아서 특가로 나왔길래 재구매했어요~ 앞전에는 반만 잘라서 줬는데 커서 먹기힘들어하길래 이번엔 잘라서 통에 넣어두고 하나씩 주니 잘먹네요~
reviews.content_en: I bought the 3-pack last time and my dog ate it well. I could see the ingredients packed in there, so I felt good about feeding it. When they had a special sale, I repurchased it. Before I was cutting it in half, but since my dog had trouble eating the whole thing, this time I cut it up and put pieces in a container to give one at a time. Now my dog eats them well~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송 빠르게 잘 도착했어요
저희집 멍뭉이가 바잇미에서 가장 좋아하는 간식이라 늘 모자라지 않게 미리미리 쟁여둡니다ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The delivery came quickly and safely. My pup's favorite snack from BITE ME, so I always keep a stock ready beforehand haha

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
저번 행사때 연어(항산화)로 사 먹였는데 정말 잘 먹더라구요! 그래서 이번에 오리로 샀습니다!
5kg 아이가 먹기에는 사이즈가 너무 커서 칼로 4-5등분 해주어 급여하면 좋습니다!
냄새를 킁킁 맛고 정말 맛있게 먹더라구요!
reviews.content_en: Last event I got the salmon (antioxidant) version and my dog ate it so well! So this time I bought the duck! For a 5kg dog, the size is pretty big, so it's good to cut it into 4-5 pieces with a knife before feeding. My dog sniffed it and ate it so deliciously!
